alerts.title: Wintermute Is Providing Liquidity on Kalshi and Polymarket, Linking Two Giants
alerts.summary: Wintermute is providing liquidity on the two biggest prediction markets, linking flows for both firms, according to a source familiar with the matter.

alerts.title: U.S. CFTC opens crypto 'perp' door with first approvals at Kalshi, Coinbase
Kalshi follows CFTC in suing Minnesota over law criminalizing prediction markets
CFTC Approves Bitcoin Perpetual Futures on Prediction Market Kalshi
alerts.summary: The CFTC issued an order allowing Kalshi to offer perpetual futures in the U.S., starting with contracts tied to Bitcoin's price.

alerts.title: Wintermute extends trading infrastructure into prediction markets
alerts.summary: Wintermute extends trading infrastructure into prediction markets as multibillion-dollar sector draws institutional liquidity providers.
